'''vayate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:varicosely|varicosely]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-y-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:varicosely|varicosely]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| vayate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:vayate|vayate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vayatesher|vayatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vayatesherĂ«m|vayatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vayatero|vayatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vayateshĂ«|vayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vayateshĂ«m|vayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivayatero|gokivayatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivayateshĂ«|gokivayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivayateshĂ«m|gokivayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govayankerom|govayankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govayankeshĂ«|govayankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govayankeshĂ«m|govayankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govayankeya|govayankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vayaterom|vayaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vayatemu|vayatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vayateya|vayateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivayaterom|gokivayaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivayatemu|gokivayatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivayateya|gokivayateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:vayayate|vayayate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vayayatesher|vayayatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vayayatesherĂ«m|vayayatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vayayatero|vayayatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vayayateshĂ«|vayayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vayayateshĂ«m|vayayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivayayatero|gokivayayatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivayayateshĂ«|gokivayayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivayayateshĂ«m|gokivayayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govayayankerom|govayayankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govayayankeshĂ«|govayayankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govayayankeshĂ«m|govayayankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govayayankeya|govayayankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vayayaterom|vayayaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vayayatemu|vayayatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vayayateya|vayayateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivayayaterom|gokivayayaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivayayatemu|gokivayayatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivayayateya|gokivayayateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:vĂŠyĂŠte|vĂŠyĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vĂŠyĂŠtesher|vĂŠyĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vĂŠyĂŠtesherĂ«m|vĂŠyĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vĂŠyĂŠtero|vĂŠyĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«|vĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m|vĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivĂŠyĂŠtero|gokivĂŠyĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«|gokivĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m|gokivĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govĂŠyĂŠnkerom|govĂŠyĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«|govĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«m|govĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govĂŠyĂŠnkeya|govĂŠyĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vĂŠyĂŠterom|vĂŠyĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vĂŠyĂŠtemu|vĂŠyĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vĂŠyĂŠteya|vĂŠyĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivĂŠyĂŠterom|gokivĂŠyĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivĂŠyĂŠtemu|gokivĂŠyĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivĂŠyĂŠteya|gokivĂŠyĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:vafyafte|vafyafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vafyaftesher|vafyaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vafyaftesherĂ«m|vafyaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vafyaftero|vafyaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vafyafteshĂ«|vafyafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vafyafteshĂ«m|vafyafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivafyaftero|gokivafyaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivafyafteshĂ«|gokivafyafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivafyafteshĂ«m|gokivafyafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govafyafnkerom|govafyafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govafyafnkeshĂ«|govafyafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govafyafnkeshĂ«m|govafyafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govafyafnkeya|govafyafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vafyafterom|vafyafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vafyaftemu|vafyaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vafyafteya|vafyafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivafyafterom|gokivafyafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivafyaftemu|gokivafyaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivafyafteya|gokivafyafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
